item.title: 4599 元起售，MacBook Neo 来袭
item.guid: 4599-元起售，MacBook-Neo-来袭
item.description:
Last night, the highly anticipated MacBook with the same processor as the iPhone finally debuted, named "MacBook Neo." Let's look at the price first: 昨晚，大家期待的 iPhone 同款处理器 MacBook 终于面世了，名为「MacBook Neo」，先看售价：

The 256GB version is 4599 yuan, and the 512GB version is 5299 yuan; both are uniformly allocated 8GB of RAM.

The screen features a 13-inch Liquid Retina display with a maximum brightness of 500 nits, supporting 1 billion colors, but only the sRGB color gamut; it is equipped with dual speakers and a dual microphone array. 屏幕采用 13 英寸的 Liquid 视网膜显示屏，亮度最高 500nits，支持 10 亿色彩，但仅支持 sRGB 色域；配备双扬声器和双麦克风阵列。

Regarding the processor, both versions use the A18 Pro chip (6-core CPU + 5-core GPU version), equipped with 60GB/s memory bandwidth. According to the official website, this machine will support Apple Intelligence. 处理器方面，两个版本均采用了 A18 Pro 芯片（6 核 CPU + 5 核 GPU 的版本），配备 60GB/s 内存带宽。据官网介绍，该款机器将支持 Apple 智能。

The exterior is made of recycled aluminum and comes in four colors: silver, indigo, yellow, and pink. Notably, the keyboard features a body-matched design. Additionally, the keyboard backlight has been removed, and the trackpad has no haptic feedback. 外观采用再生铝打造，配备银、靛蓝、黄、粉四个配色，值得关注的是，键盘采用机身同色设计。另外，键盘背光取消，且触控板无压感。

In terms of interface configuration, the MacBook Neo is only equipped with one USB 3 port (10Gb/s) and one USB 2 port, and has a 3.5mm headphone jack. 接口配置上，MacBook Neo 仅配备一枚 USB 3 接口（10Gb/s）和一枚 USB 2 接口，拥有 3.5mm 耳机插孔。

🔗 Related Reading: Over 3,000 after national subsidy! Apple's Dopamine MacBook Neo is here! No notch 🔗 相关阅读： 国补后三千多！苹果多巴胺 MacBook Neo 来了！没有刘海

item.title: 雷军呼吁：不要过度依赖辅助驾驶
item.guid: 雷军呼吁：不要过度依赖辅助驾驶
item.description:
According to "Beijing Daily" news, the 2026 National Two Sessions are about to open. Lei Jun, National People's Congress deputy and founder of Xiaomi Group, accepted an interview with reporters and expressed his views on how to build a strong safety defense for smart cars. 据「北京日报」消息，2026 全国两会即将启幕，全国人大代表、小米集团创始人雷军接受记者采访，就如何筑牢智能汽车安全防线发表了看法。

Lei Jun specifically mentioned that the assisted driving functions of current smart cars still highly rely on human drivers, who must remain focused during driving. He called on the media to strengthen publicity to make the public aware that current assisted driving systems have not yet reached L4 level, so drivers must not take it lightly. 雷军特别提到，当前智能汽车的辅助驾驶功能仍高度依赖人类驾驶员，驾驶人在行车过程中必须保持精力集中。其呼吁媒体加强宣传，让公众认识到目前的辅助驾驶系统尚未达到 L4 级别，因此驾驶员千万不能掉以轻心。

In Lei Jun's "2026 Two Sessions NPC Deputy Suggestions" released yesterday, he also mentioned that current intelligent technology routes are diverse and difficult to standardize with a unified standard, and driving training content and assessment standards have not yet been properly aligned with new technologies and functions of vehicles. 在雷军昨日公布的「2026 两会人大代表建议」中，其还提到，目前智能化技术路线多元，难以用统一标准进行规范， 而驾驶培训内容与考核标准尚未与车辆的新技术、新功能做好衔接配套。

In response, Lei Jun suggested that the construction of intelligent automotive technology standards and the optimization of motor vehicle driving assessment items should be accelerated , increasing the weight of intelligent connected vehicle-related content in driving tests; at the same time, a new generation of driving simulation training equipment integrating scenario recognition, complex road condition simulation, and dangerous situation handling functions needs to be developed and promoted. 对此雷军建议， 应该加快建设汽车智能化技术标准和优化机动车驾驶考核项目 ，提升智能网联汽车相关内容在驾考中的权重； 同时还需研发推广融合场景认知，复杂路况模拟，危险情境处置等功能的新一代驾驶模拟实训装备。

According to "China Fund News," He Xiaopeng, a deputy to the 14th National People's Congress and Chairman and CEO of XPeng Motors, recently submitted three proposals focusing on key areas of scientific and technological innovation and industrial innovation development, involving industries such as autonomous driving technology. 另据「中国基金报」消息，第十四届全国人大代表、小鹏汽车董事长兼 CEO 何小鹏日前也围绕科技创新、产业创新发展的关键领域提交了三项建议，涉及自动驾驶技术等产业。

He Xiaopeng stated that promoting the policy and regulatory system to achieve a leap from L2 to L4 level, and facilitating rapid technological iteration and large-scale commercialization, will help transform China's accumulated advantages in L2 into competitive advantages in the L4 autonomous driving era. 何小鹏表示，推动政策与法规体系实现从 L2 级向 L4 级的跨越，促进技术快速迭代与规模化商用，将有助于我国在 L2 级的积累优势转化为 L4 级自动驾驶时代的竞争优势。

He Xiaopeng proposed four suggestions: 何小鹏提出四点建议：

    It is suggested that, while maintaining the stable operation of the L2-level safety supervision system, autonomous driving policies should be promoted to leap from L2 to L4, simplifying the intermediate steps of L3;

    It is suggested to gradually clarify the registration and traffic management system for L4 autonomous driving vehicles, and progressively promote L4 vehicles to legally operate on roads nationwide;

    It is suggested to conduct an adaptability assessment of traffic regulations, and, based on autonomous driving characteristics and under the premise of safety, optimize and form traffic behavior norms applicable to "human driving" and "machine driving" categories;

    It is suggested to grant local pilot management rights for L4-level unmanned driving C-end applications in specific scenarios, allowing some cities with mature basic conditions to conduct L4-level application pilots in specific low-risk scenarios, gradually forming replicable and scalable experience.

item.title: 林俊旸提出离职后，阿里高管紧急答疑
item.guid: 林俊旸提出离职后，阿里高管紧急答疑
item.description:
In the early hours of yesterday, Lin Junyang, the technical lead of Alibaba's Qwen large model, suddenly announced his resignation on social media. This subsequently sparked a wave of discussion on the internet. 昨日凌晨，阿里千问大模型技术负责人林俊旸在社交平台上突然宣布离职。随后互联网掀起一阵讨论热浪。

It is reported that Lin Junyang was a key promoter of Alibaba's AI open-source models and one of Alibaba's youngest P10s. 据悉，林俊旸是阿里 AI 开源模型的核心推手，也是阿里最年轻的 P10 之一。

According to "Intelligent Emergence" reports, yesterday afternoon, Tongyi Lab urgently held an All Hands meeting, where Alibaba Group CEO Wu Yongming frankly told Qwen employees, "I should have known about this sooner." 而据「智能涌现」报道，昨日下午，通义实验室紧急召开了 All Hands 会议，阿里集团 CEO 吴泳铭向千问员工坦诚表示「我应该要更早知道这些」。

Attendees of the meeting included several Alibaba executives, the Qwen team, and other members of the Tongyi Lab. Regarding key issues such as team adjustments and strategic direction, multiple responses were given by Alibaba Chairman and CEO Wu Yongming, Alibaba Chief People Officer Jiang Fang, and Alibaba Cloud CTO Zhou Jingren. 该场会议与会者包括阿里数位高管、Qwen 团队以及通义实验室其他团队成员。围绕团队调整、战略方向等关键议题，包括阿里巴巴董事长兼 CEO 吴泳铭，阿里巴巴首席人才官蒋芳、阿里云 CTO 周靖人做出多个回应。

Regarding this adjustment, the core characterization given by Alibaba's senior management is: Qwen is not shrinking; this is a team expansion, unrelated to any political struggle, and instead requires more resources. 对于此次调整，阿里高层给出的核心定性是：Qwen 没有收缩，这是一次团队扩张，无关任何政治斗争，反而需要投入更多资源。

The report stated that Jiang Fang, Alibaba's Chief People Officer, also admitted to insufficient communication: "We are developing rapidly, and this adjustment is to expand more talent and provide more resources. The organizational form was not communicated well this time, and the introduction of new people will definitely bring changes in the lineup. These are inevitably involved in the expansion process, and we may not have handled it well." 报道称，阿里巴巴首席人才官蒋芳也承认沟通存在不足：「我们在快速发展，这波调整是为了扩充更多人才、提供更多资源。这次组织形式没沟通好，新人引入肯定会带来阵型变化，扩大过程中必然涉及到这些，我们可能没处理好。」

Regarding rumors that Zhou Hao will directly lead Lin Junyang and his related team, the report stated that "including Zhou Hao's successor position and reporting lines, are still under discussion." 针对有传言称周浩将直接领导林俊旸及其相关团队，报道称「包括周浩的接任职位，汇报线，尚在讨论中。」

At the same time, facing the problem that "external teams use Alibaba Cloud computing power smoothly, while internal teams are struggling with computing power and recruitment quotas," Zhou Jingren stated that the team is in a "resource-constrained state," and there are many historical reasons for the internal and external differences. A comprehensive plan is being made for the future, but no further details were provided. 同时面对「外部用阿里云算力流畅，内部团队反而在算力、招聘名额上捉襟见肘」这一问题，周靖人表示，团队处于「资源紧张状态」，内外差异有很多历史原因，未来正在做整体规划，但没有进一步展开说明。

The report also mentioned that Alibaba's senior management is still in close communication with Lin Junyang, and it is not yet known whether Lin Junyang has confirmed his departure from Alibaba. 报道还提到， 阿里巴巴高层还和林俊旸密切沟通中，林俊旸是否确认离开阿里巴巴还未可知。

Separately, yesterday afternoon, Lin Junyang posted on WeChat Moments, saying, "Brothers of qwen, continue to work as originally planned, no problem," but did not explicitly state whether he would return. 另在昨日下午，林俊旸发布朋友圈，表示「qwen 的兄弟们，按照原来安排继续干，没问题的」， 并未明确是否回归。

item.title: 英伟达将在本月举行 AI 大会
item.guid: 英伟达将在本月举行-AI-大会
item.description:
Recently, Nvidia officially announced that it will hold GTC, an AI and accelerated computing event, from March 16 to 19 this year in San Jose, California. 日前，英伟达正式宣布将于今年 3 月 16 日至 19 日在加利福尼亚州圣何塞举行 AI 和加速计算盛会 GTC。

It is reported that CEO Jensen Huang's keynote speech will still be featured at this AI conference, which will also include over 1000 sessions and groundbreaking achievements covering the entire AI stack. 据悉，本次 AI 大会上依然能看到 CEO 黄仁勋的主题演讲，同时还将包含 1000 多场会议以及涵盖整个 AI 堆栈的突破性成果。

Huang Renxun stated that GTC is the center of the AI industrial era. He also pointed out: 黄仁勋表示，GTC 是 AI 工业时代的中心。同时其指出：

AI is no longer a single breakthrough or application, but an indispensable infrastructure that every company will embrace. Every country will build it. From energy and chips to infrastructure, models, and applications, all layers of the stack are advancing collaboratively, and all of this will be fully showcased at GTC.

According to the official introduction, Huang Renxun's keynote speech will be held at 11:00 AM local time on Monday, March 16. 官方介绍，黄仁勋主题演讲将于当地时间 3 月 16 日（星期一）上午 11:00 举行。

item.title: 特斯拉无人出租车 Cybercab 或迎大规模生产
item.guid: 特斯拉无人出租车-Cybercab-或迎大规模生产
item.description:
According to TESLARATI, Tesla is accelerating the pre-production of its autonomous taxi Cybercab and plans to begin mass production next month. 据 TESLARATI 报道，特斯拉方面正在加速无人出租车 Cybercab 的预生产，并且计划下个月开始大规模量产。

The report disclosed that at least 25 Cybercabs have accumulated at Tesla's Texas Gigafactory, marking the largest concentrated exposure of the model to date. 据报道披露，目前特斯拉得州超级工厂内已累计出现至少 25 辆 Cybercab，为该车型迄今最大规模的集中曝光。

The images show 14 vehicles parked at the factory exit, 9 at the crash test center for structural and safety verification, and another 2 in the final assembly off-line area for final inspection. Some vehicles have also been observed undergoing dynamic road tests within the factory premises. 画面显示，14 辆车停放于工厂出口处，9 辆位于碰撞测试中心进行结构与安全验证，另有 2 辆处于总装下线区域进行最终检测，且部分车辆已被观测到正在厂区内进行动态路测。

It is reported that the first production version of the Cybercab rolled off the production line in mid-February 2026, based on a dedicated "unboxed process," ahead of the originally scheduled April timeline. 据悉，首辆量产版 Cybercab 已于 2026 年 2 月中旬基于专属的「开箱工艺」产线下线，较原定 4 月的节点有所提前。

Combining previous statements from Tesla executives, the report points out that high-frequency test manufacturing marks a substantial ramp-up in production capacity. True mass production is expected to begin within the next 4 to 8 weeks, with the current cautious advancement primarily aimed at validating the model's new architecture and its adaptation to pure vision Full Self-Driving (FSD) technology. 结合特斯拉高管此前声明，报道指出，高频次的测试制造标志着产能的实质性爬坡，真正的大规模量产预计将在未来 4 至 8 周内启动，当前的谨慎推进主要为验证该车型的全新架构及其对纯视觉完全自动驾驶（FSD）技术的适配。

item.title: AMD 苏妈：内存涨价会给电脑市场带来巨大成本压力
item.guid: AMD-苏妈：内存涨价会给电脑市场带来巨大成本压力
item.description:
According to a report by Yicai, on the evening of March 3, at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference, AMD CEO Lisa Su had a dialogue with Morgan Stanley analysts. At the conference, Su responded to several hot market issues. 据第一财经报道，3 月 3 日晚，在摩根士丹利技术、媒体和电信会议上，AMD CEO 苏姿丰与摩根士丹利分析师进行了一场对话。会上，苏姿丰回应了多个市场热点问题。

When discussing the collaboration with OpenAI, Lisa Su stated that AMD's partnership with OpenAI is better than ever, and both parties are actively planning the installation of the first gigawatt of computing power. The MI450 has been jointly validated by both parties, and their transaction structure has not changed. 苏姿丰谈到与 OpenAI 的合作情况时，其表示AMD 与 OpenAI 的合作关系比以往任何时候都好，双方正在积极规划第一个吉瓦的算力安装，MI450 基本是双方共同验证的，双方的交易结构也没有发生改变。

Regarding the concern that "large tech companies' investments in AI infrastructure may not have long-term continuity," Lisa Su responded that investments in AI infrastructure can, to some extent, be seen as investments in productivity and intelligence. Companies are investing ahead of time, taking into account the returns they will receive. 针对「大型科技企业对 AI 基础设施的投资可能不具有长期连续性」这一声音，苏姿丰回应称，对 AI 基础设施的投资某种程度上可以视为对生产力和智力的投资，企业正在超前投资，并考虑到将获得的回报。

Lisa Su also discussed the tight CPU supply, stating that the reason is that the market size is larger than predicted 3 or 6 months ago, and the supply chain needs time to meet market demand. She revealed that AMD is in a favorable position in its cooperation with the supply chain, able to meet a large proportion of demand, and will expand supply capacity in 2026 and 2027. 苏姿丰也谈到 CPU 供应的紧张，称原因是市场规模比 3 个月、6 个月前预测的更大，供应链需要时间才能满足市场需求。其透露，AMD 与供应链的合作处于有利地位，能满足很大比例的需求，并将在 2026 年和 2027 年扩大供应能力。

Regarding the impact of memory shortages on GPUs and CPUs, Lisa Su stated that the price increases for consumer-grade memory like DDR4 and DDR5 are affecting systemic pricing. It is expected that rising memory prices will bring greater cost pressure to the personal computer market, and market fluctuations may be more moderate in the second half of this year, but changes in the memory market still need to be observed. 就内存短缺对 GPU、CPU 的影响，苏姿丰则表示，DDR4、DDR5 这些用于消费级产品的内存涨价，正在影响系统性的定价。预计内存涨价将给个人电脑市场带来更大的成本压力，预计今年下半年可能市场波动更加温和，但仍需要观察内存市场发生的变化。

In addition, Lisa Su also mentioned at the conference, "In the next phase of AI infrastructure, no single chip can do everything best; it's already a heterogeneous world." 另外，苏姿丰还在会上提到，「在 AI 基础设施的下一个阶段，没有一块单一的芯片能把所有事情做到最好，这已经是一个异构的世界。」

item.title: 本田计划将在华产纯电车型进口回日本
item.guid: 本田计划将在华产纯电车型进口回日本
item.description:
e:NP 2

According to Nikkei Asia, Honda currently plans to import pure electric vehicle models produced in China to Japan, with sales beginning as early as spring 2026. 据日经新闻报道，本田目前计划把在中国生产的纯电动车型进口到日本，并最早于 2026 年春季开始销售。

The report points out that this is the first time a Japanese automaker will import and sell pure electric vehicles produced in China. 报道指出，这是日本车企首次进口并销售在中国生产的纯电动汽车。

It is reported that Honda will use vehicles from its pure electric vehicle-specific brand "e:N," launched in China in 2022, as prototypes, adapting them to Japanese specifications for sale. 据悉，本田将以 2022 年在中国推出的纯电动汽车专用品牌「e:N」的车辆为原型，适配日本规格后进行销售。

According to inquiries, the relevant models may be e:NP 2 (GAC Honda's Extreme Purity 2, with a sister model e:NS 2 from Dongfeng Honda), both pure electric compact SUVs, launched in 2024, and both built on Honda's pure electric e:N architecture. 据查询获知，相关车型或为 e:NP 2（极湃 2，另有姊妹车型 e:NS 2），由广汽本田和东风本田分别生产，均为纯电紧凑型 SUV，于 2024 年上市销售，均基于本田的纯电 e:N 架构打造。

The report states that the brand name for the return to the Japanese market is tentatively "Insight." Honda launched the first generation Insight in 1999 and ceased production of the third-generation model in 2022. 报道称，回到日本市场的品牌名称拟定为「Insight」。本田于 1999 年推出第一代 Insight，并于 2022 年终止了第三代车型的生产。

In addition, Honda's move is also aimed at rescuing its Chinese factories, which are deeply mired in declining market performance. It is reported that Honda's new car sales in China for 2025 were 645,345 units, a year-on-year decrease of 24%, marking a continuous decline for 5 years. 另外，本田此举也是为了拯救深陷市场表现下滑的中国区工厂。并据报道，2025 年本田的在华新车销量为 64 万 5345 辆，同比下滑 24％，已连续 5 年减少。

item.title: 阶跃星辰开源 Step 3.5 Flash 训练框架
item.guid: 阶跃星辰开源-Step-3.5-Flash-训练框架
item.description:
Yesterday, StepFun announced that following the open-sourcing of its Step 3.5 Flash model, it has now open-sourced the pre-training/mid-training/training framework for this Agent base model. 昨日，阶跃星辰方面发文宣布，其继 Step 3.5 Flash 模型开源，又开源了这款 Agent 基座模型的预训练/中训练/训练框架。

It is reported that Step 3.5 Flash is StepFun's most powerful open-source foundational model to date, possessing strong reasoning capabilities and Agent intelligence, specifically designed for Agents. 据悉，Step 3.5 Flash 是阶跃星辰迄今为止能力最强的开源基础模型，具备强大推理能力与 Agent 智能，专为 Agent 而生。

StepFun hopes that through more thorough open-sourcing, developers can use Step 3.5 Flash as a base to perform deeper model customization and create their own Agents: 而阶跃星辰方面希望通过更彻底的开源，让开发者能够以 Step 3.5 Flash 为基座进行更深度模型定制，打造真正属于自己的 Agent：

    Base Weights: Foundational model, suitable for full-parameter fine-tuning;

    Midtrain Weights: Stronger reasoning capabilities, suitable for secondary development such as Agents and tool calling;

    Steptron Training Framework: The official training framework, covering continuous pre-training, supervised fine-tuning, reinforcement learning (coming soon), evaluation (coming soon), and other stages.

Base Weights: https://huggingface.co/stepfun-ai/Step-3.5-Flash-Base Base 权重： https://huggingface.co/stepfun-ai/Step-3.5-Flash-Base

Midtrain Weights: https://huggingface.co/stepfun-ai/Step-3.5-Flash-Base-Midtrain Midtrain 权重： https://huggingface.co/stepfun-ai/Step-3.5-Flash-Base-Midtrain

Steptron Training Framework: https://github.com/stepfun-ai/SteptronOss Steptron 训练框架： https://github.com/stepfun-ai/SteptronOss

item.title: AI 初创 Flowith 完成千万美元融资
item.guid: AI-初创-Flowith-完成千万美元融资
item.description:
According to "Z Potentials," AI startup Flowith recently announced the completion of multi-million dollar seed and seed+ round financing. 据「Z Potentials」报道，AI 初创 Flowith 近期宣布，完成千万美元种子轮和种子+轮融资。

It is reported that the seed round was led by Vertex Ventures and other institutions, while the seed+ round was co-led by Sequoia China Seed Fund, LongRiver Investments, and several other top-tier institutions. The raised funds will primarily be used for R&D and global market expansion. 据悉，种子轮为祥峰投资（Vertex Ventures）等机构，种子+轮为红杉中国种子基金、江远投资（LongRiver）等多家顶尖机构联合领投，融资资金将主要用于研发以及全球化市场拓展。

The report states that Flowith garnered significant attention upon its launch due to its innovative interactive methods. It has pioneered the release of industry-leading innovative products and features such as the first general-purpose creative agent framework Oracle, AI Context Knowledge Garden, infinite-step agent Agent Neo, and the first OS Agent – FlowithOS, gaining millions of deep users both domestically and internationally. 报道称，Flowith 一经推出就以创新性的交互方式获取了大量关注，并领先推出了首个通用型创作智能体框架 Oracle、AI Context 知识花园、无限步骤智能体 Agent Neo、首个 OS Agent – FlowithOS 等业界前沿创新产品与功能、在海内外获得了数百万深度用户。

item.title: Seedance 2.0 价格公布
item.guid: Seedance-2.0-价格公布
item.description:
Recently, ByteDance Volcano Engine officially announced the pricing standards for its Doubao-Seedance-2.0 video generation model: 日前，字节火山引擎正式公布了 Doubao-Seedance-2.0 视频生成模型的定价标准：

Including video input: 28 yuan/million tokens; excluding video input: 46 yuan/million tokens.

It is reported that generating a 15-second video using Seedance 2.0 consumes approximately 308,800 tokens. Based on this, the price for pure video generation (excluding video input) is about 1 yuan per second. 据悉，使用 Seedance 2.0 生成 15 秒视频，大约需要消耗 30.88 万 tokens，以此计算，纯视频生成（不含视频输入）的价格大约为 1 元 1 秒。

It is worth noting that Doubao-Seedance-2.0 does not offer API access. 值得关注的是，Doubao-Seedance-2.0 未开放 API 接入。

item.title: 蚂蚁发布 AReaL v1.0：Agent 一键接入 RL 训练
item.guid: 蚂蚁发布-AReaL-v1.0：Agent-一键接入-RL-训练
item.description:
On March 4, Ant Group, in collaboration with Tsinghua University, released the stable version of its open-source reinforcement learning training framework, AReaL v1.0. This version focuses on 'one-click Agent access to RL training': no code modification needed, compatible with various Agent frameworks, making intelligent agent reinforcement learning training out-of-the-box. 3 月 4 日，蚂蚁集团联合清华大学发布开源强化学习训练框架 AReaL v1.0 稳定版。该版本主打「Agent 一键接入 RL 训练」：不用改代码，兼容各类 Agent 框架，让智能体强化学习训练开箱即用。

Since the beginning of 2026, Agents have continued to gain momentum, with intelligent agent frameworks represented by LangChain, Claude Code, and OpenClaw flourishing. However, two major bottlenecks have also been exposed: first, high costs for training access, and second, Agents' lack of continuous evolution capabilities. 2026 年开年以来，Agent 持续升温，以 LangChain、Claude Code、OpenClaw 为代表的智能体框架繁荣发展，但也暴露出两大瓶颈。一是接入训练成本高，二是 Agent 缺乏持续进化的能力。

AReaL is the first fully asynchronous training-inference decoupled large model reinforcement learning training system, enabling Agents to receive feedback and continuously optimize decisions through real task interactions. 而 AReaL 是首个全异步训推解耦的大模型强化学习训练系统，能让 Agent 在真实任务交互中获得反馈、持续优化决策。

According to the official introduction, the v1.0 version released this time makes it possible for any Agent to access RL training with zero modification—by adding a Proxy Worker intermediary layer between the intelligent agent and the training system, developers only need to modify a request address to access training. 官方介绍，此次发布的 v1.0 版本让任意 Agent 零改造接入 RL 训练成为现实——通过在智能体与训练系统之间加入 Proxy Worker 中转层，开发者只需修改一个请求地址即可接入训练。

AReaL v1.0 also introduces its native training engine, Archon, which implements full 5D parallelism (data parallelism, pipeline parallelism, tensor parallelism, context parallelism, expert parallelism) based on PyTorch's native capabilities, lowering installation and debugging thresholds. It also provides multiple backend options for both training and inference, facilitating flexible deployment in different environments. AReaL v1.0 还推出了原生训练引擎 Archon，它是基于 PyTorch 原生能力实现完整的 5D 并行（数据并行、流水线并行、张量并行、上下文并行、专家并行），降低了安装与调试门槛，同时在训练与推理侧提供多种后端选择，便于在不同环境中灵活部署。

It is reported that such a complex distributed system, from scratch to verification of correctness, only took 1 person-month of effort—within 32 days, nearly a million lines of code were cumulatively modified to fully implement the Archon engine, enabling it to train trillion-parameter MoE models. 据悉，样一个复杂的分布式系统，从零开始实现到验证正确性，仅用了 1 人·月的工作量——32 天内，累计修改近百万行代码完整实现了 Archon 引擎，让它能训练千亿参数 MoE 模型。

GitHub Repository: https://github.com/inclusionAI/AReaL GitHub 仓库： https://github.com/inclusionAI/AReaL

Related Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.24298 相关论文： https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.24298

item.title: 智元灵渠 OS 开源上线
item.guid: 智元灵渠-OS-开源上线
item.description:
Yesterday, Zhiyuan Robotics announced that its Lingqu OS Alpha version has been officially open-sourced and released. 昨日，智元机器人宣布，其灵渠 OS Alpha 版本已正式开源发布。

According to the introduction, Lingqu OS is based on the full-scenario requirements of embodied intelligent robots, aiming to build an ecological architecture that 'adapts to embodied hardware to the south and supports intelligent applications to the north'. 据介绍，灵渠 OS 立足具身智能机器人的全场景需求，旨在构建 「南向适配具身硬件、北向支撑智能应用」 的生态架构。

The official statement indicates that the Lingqu OS Alpha version released this time is based on the full-size Zhiyuan Expedition A2 body from mass production practice, open-sourcing a cross-platform embodied software framework, a reinforcement learning-based bipedal motion control framework, and a one-stop toolchain for bipedal motion control simulation, training, and deployment. 官方表示，本次发布的灵渠 OS Alpha 版本，是基于量产实践的全尺寸智元远征 A2 本体，开源跨平台具身软件框架、基于强化学习的双足运控框架与双足运控仿真训练部署一站式工具链。

In terms of features, Lingqu OS Alpha version boasts characteristics such as a 'unified communication middleware framework,' a 'one-stop toolchain for reinforcement learning simulation, training, and deployment,' and 'end-to-end development and deployment'. 特性方面，灵渠 OS Alpha 版本拥有「统一通信中间件框架」「强化学习仿真、训练与部署一站式工具链」「端到端开发部署」等特点。

Lingqu OS Alpha: https://github.com/Link-U-OS 灵渠 OS Alpha： https://github.com/Link-U-OS

item.title: iQOO 旗舰产品线总监宣布离职
item.guid: iQOO-旗舰产品线总监宣布离职
item.description:
Yesterday, 'Golam V', product line director of iQOO's flagship series, confirmed on Weibo that he will be leaving the iQOO team. 昨日，iQOO 旗舰系列产品线总监「戈蓝 V」在微博发文确认，自己将离开 iQOO 团队。

He stated that he joined the company in 2017 and then the iQOO founding team in 2018, 'thus embarking on a great journey of 'born strong, never stop exploring'. 其表示，自己于 2017 年加入公司，并在 2018 年加入 iQOO 初创团队，「由此开启了一段『生而强悍、探索不止』的伟大征程。」

Currently, Golam has not disclosed his future plans. 目前戈蓝并未透露自己的未来去向。

According to available information, Gelan's real name is Jian Zhong. He served as the Product Director for iQOO's flagship product line for a long time. Before joining the iQOO brand, he was a senior hardware engineer at Samsung Electronics, possessing extremely deep industry background and technical expertise. 据资料显示，戈蓝本名简重，曾长期担任 iQOO 旗舰产品线的产品总监。在加入 iQOO 品牌之前，他曾是三星电子的一名资深硬件工程师，拥有极其深厚的行业背景与技术积淀。

item.title: 💡 吴恩达：AGI 仍遥远
item.guid: 💡-吴恩达：AGI-仍遥远
item.description:
Recently, AI scholar Andrew Ng, in an exclusive interview with "This Is The World," pointed out that AGI (Artificial General Intelligence) has been overhyped and reduced to a marketing term, asserting that the industry will not achieve true AGI within 2026. 近日，人工智能学者吴恩达（Andrew Ng）在「This Is The World」专访中，指出 AGI（通用人工智能）已被过度炒作并沦为营销术语，且断言 2026 年内行业无法实现真正的 AGI。

During the interview, Ng criticized some current companies for frequently altering and lowering the standards of AGI for public relations or fundraising purposes. 采访中，吴恩达批评当前部分企业为公关或融资目的频繁篡改并降低 AGI 的标准。

He proposed a new "Turing AGI Test": AI would only meet the public's reasonable expectations for AGI if it could independently complete economically valuable work tasks over several consecutive days, much like a skilled human remote worker. 他提出了一项全新的「图灵 AGI 测试」：若 AI 能够像熟练的人类远程工作者一样，在连续多天的体验中独立完成具有经济价值的工作任务，才符合社会公众对 AGI 的合理预期。

Ng stated that achieving this goal is still decades away, and as public internet data approaches exhaustion, the path of simply relying on expanding parameter scale to enhance intelligence is facing challenges. 吴恩达表示，距离实现该目标仍有数十年距离，且随着公开互联网数据接近枯竭，单纯依赖扩大参数规模来提升智能的路径正面临挑战。

Regarding future technological evolution, Ng pointed out that the core business value in 2026 and beyond will focus on "agent workflows." 针对后续技术演进方向，吴恩达指出 2026 年及以后的核心商业价值将集中在「智能体工作流」。

He believes that compared to blindly pursuing an omniscient and omnipotent monolithic large model, empowering existing large language models with tool-calling capabilities and safeguards, allowing them to process tasks in vertical domains such as legal compliance, medical assistance, and customer service step-by-step, will generate more definite economic benefits. 他认为，相比于盲目追求全知全能的单体大模型，通过赋予现有大型语言模型工具调用能力与护栏，让其分步骤处理法律合规、医疗辅助及客户服务等垂直领域任务，将产生更为确定的经济效益。

item.title: 三星手动伸缩屏概念机亮相
item.guid: 三星手动伸缩屏概念机亮相
item.description:
At the recent MWC 2026, Samsung showcased its latest retractable screen concept phone. 在近期的 MWC 2026 上，三星展出了最新的伸缩屏概念机。

According to Android Authority, in its retracted state, the concept phone's screen measures 5.1 inches with a 16:9 aspect ratio. When fully extended, it reaches 6.7 inches (22:9 aspect ratio), similar in size to current standard slab phones, with FHD+ resolution and a pixel density of 426ppi. 据 Android Authority 报道，收纳状态下，该款概念机的屏幕尺寸为 16:9 的 5.1 英寸，完全展开后可达 6.7 英寸（比例为 22:9），与目前的普通直板机型尺寸类似，分辨率为 FHD+，像素密度 426ppi。

However, this retractable screen device did not demonstrate electric retraction. The mass production time is also pending. 但该款伸缩屏设备并无展示电动伸缩。并且量产时间待定。

item.title: 问界、尊界双双涨价！首发像素级激光雷达
item.guid: 问界、尊界双双涨价！首发像素级激光雷达
item.description:
Yesterday, the HarmonyOS Smart Travel Technology Refresh Launch Event was officially held. 昨日，鸿蒙智行技术焕新发布会正式举行。

🔗 Related reading: Wenjie and Zunjie both increase prices! Pixel-level lidar debuts, Shangjie Z7 interior also announced 🔗 相关阅读： 问界、尊界双双涨价！首发像素级激光雷达，尚界 Z7 内饰一并公布

At the conference, the 2026 Wenjie M9 and Zunjie S800 were announced to be equipped with a new generation of 896-line dual-optical-path pixel-level lidar, as well as comprehensively upgraded active safety technology. 会上，2026 款问界 M9 与尊界 S800 宣布将搭载全新一代 896 线双光路像素级级激光雷达，以及全面升级的主动安全技术。

Specifically, the new 896-line lidar supports stable recognition of obstacles higher than 14 centimeters from 120 meters away; additionally, the lidar surface is covered with a special tempered film glass window. 具体来看，全新的 896 线激光雷达支持在 120 米外，稳定识别高于 14 厘米的障碍物；同时雷达表面覆盖了一层特制的钢化膜玻璃视窗。

In terms of price, the Zunjie S800 equipped with the new lidar starts at 728,000 yuan, an increase of 20,000 yuan compared to the previous 192-line version; the starting price of the Wenjie M9 also rose to 479,800 yuan, also an increase of 10,000 yuan. 价格方面，搭载全新激光雷达的尊界 S800 起售价为 72.8 万元，比此前的 192 线版本上调了 2 万元；问界 M9 的起售价也顺势来到 47.98 万元，同样有 1 万元的涨幅。

Additionally, the Shangjie Z7 series was also showcased at this launch event. The new car offers both sedan and shooting brake versions. The Shangjie Z7 series will feature a dynamic four-dimensional screen and an "inspiration window" in front of the passenger seat. 另外，本次发布会上还展示了尚界 Z7 系列。新车共提供轿车和猎装两个版本。尚界 Z7 系列将搭载随动四维屏以及副驾前方的「灵感橱窗」。

item.title: Android 版「PC 模式」上线
item.guid: Android-版「PC-模式」上线
item.description:
Recently, Google officially launched a new desktop mode for the Pixel 8 series and subsequent models. 近期，Google 正式为 Pixel 8 系列及后续机型，推出了新的桌面模式。

It is reported that phones supporting this feature can obtain a PC-like interface on a monitor simply by connecting with a USB-C cable. 据悉，支持该功能的手机只需使用 USB-C 线缆与显示器连接，即可在显示器获得一个类似 PC 模式的界面。

It's worth noting that this feature supports not only phones but also tablets, offering a similar experience, though tablets can achieve extended screen display. 值得一提的是，该功能不仅支持手机，平板也可以获得类似的体验，但平板方面能够实现屏幕拓展显示。

According to reports, this feature draws inspiration from Samsung DeX's design philosophy, aiming to provide users with a more efficient multitasking environment. Users can run multiple applications simultaneously, freely adjust window sizes, and it supports both wired/wireless keyboards and mice, facilitating light office work. 据介绍，据介绍，该功能借鉴了 Samsung DeX 的设计理念，目的是为用户提供更高效的多任务处理环境，用户可以同时运行多个应用，并自由调整窗口大小，同时支持有线 / 无线键盘鼠标，便于轻度办公处理。

item.title: 岚图新车 FE 将配备全新 896 线四激光
item.guid: 岚图新车-FE-将配备全新-896-线四激光
item.description:
On March 4, the intelligent driving sector ushered in an important moment. HarmonyOS Smart Travel's "Zunjie" officially announced the release of its new generation 896-line quad-laser radar. On the same day, the new Lantu FE car was unveiled, with its silhouette outlining four new laser radar modules. 3 月 4 日，智能驾驶领域迎来重要时刻。鸿蒙智行「尊界」正式官宣发布全新一代 896 线四激光雷达。同一天，岚图 FE 新车曝光，其车型剪影勾勒出四颗全新激光雷达模组。

Some sources speculate that Lantu FE might synchronize with Zunjie, featuring the world's highest-spec 896-line radar, entering a new era of quad-laser radar. 有消息猜测，岚图 FE 或将同步尊界，搭载全球最高规格 896 线，迈入全新一代四激光雷达时代。

It is revealed that the quad-laser radar equipped in Zunjie belongs to L3-level intelligent assisted driving hardware. Its detection capabilities will see a qualitative leap in ultra-high-definition imaging, ultra-long-range detection, and ultra-precise recognition. It can accurately identify previously indistinct gravel and distant obstacles, shortening response times. Even in adverse weather conditions like rain, fog, or night, its perception stability is significantly enhanced. 据透露，尊界所搭载的四激光雷达属于 L3 级智能辅助驾驶硬件，其探测能力将在超高清成像、超远距离探测、超精准识别上迎来质的提升，可对以前看不清的碎石、远距离的障碍物实现精准识别，缩短响应时间。即便是雨雾、夜间等恶劣天气下的感知稳定性也显著提升。

Previously, Lantu FE gained popularity online as "Fara Lantu" and "Quad-laser Ferrari," being dubbed an FUV that "exceeds expectations" and a "rebellious new work" that will most excite young people in 2026. According to Lantu Auto's previously revealed new car plan, Lantu FE will be launched in mid-2026. 此前，岚图 FE 因「法拉岚」、「四激光法拉利」网络走红，被称为超越「预期」的 FUV，是 2026 年最让年轻人上头的「叛逆新作」。根据此前岚图汽车曝光的新车计划，岚图 FE 将于 2026 年中上市。

item.title: 瑞幸大股东被曝将收购蓝瓶咖啡
item.guid: 瑞幸大股东被曝将收购蓝瓶咖啡
item.description:
According to a report by "LatePost," Dazheng Capital has won the bid for Blue Bottle Coffee and is about to complete the transaction with Nestlé. 据《晚点 LatePost》报道，大钲资本竞得蓝瓶咖啡（Blue Bottle Coffee），即将和雀巢完成交易。

According to sources close to Luckin, Dazheng has acquired Blue Bottle Coffee's global stores, while Nestlé will retain Blue Bottle's coffee machine and capsule business. Another source close to Dazheng stated that the deal has been signed but not yet finalized. 据接近瑞幸的人士透露，大钲买下蓝瓶咖啡全球门店，雀巢将保留蓝瓶的咖啡机和胶囊业务。而另一位接近大钲的人士称，目前交易已签字，尚未完成交割。

The report points out that Dazheng Capital, as the actual controlling party of Luckin Coffee, began actively evaluating high-end coffee targets late last year, including Costa, M Stand, and % Arabica, in addition to Blue Bottle. 报道指出，作为瑞幸咖啡的实际控制方，大钲资本去年底开始积极评估高端咖啡标的，除 Blue Bottle 之外，还包括 Costa、M Stand 和 % Arabica。

It is reported that Dazheng Capital is a private equity fund management company founded by Li Hui in 2017, currently managing over $7 billion. Dazheng became an early investor in Luckin in 2018. After Luckin's fraud scandal in 2020, Dazheng led Luckin's restructuring, took over founder Lu Zhengyao's equity, and continued to invest, becoming Luckin's actual controller with over 50% of the voting rights. In May last year, Li Hui became Luckin's chairman. 据悉，大钲资本是 2017 年由黎辉创立的私募股权基金管理公司，目前管理规模超 70 亿美元。大钲在 2018 年成为瑞幸的早期投资者，2020 年瑞幸造假风波后主导瑞幸重组，接手创始人陆正耀的股权及持续跟投，以超过 50% 的投票权成为瑞幸的实控人。去年 5 月，黎辉出任瑞幸董事长。

The report also stated that the acquisition of Blue Bottle will help Luckin advance its high-end strategy, and Luckin will also leverage its supply chain capabilities to optimize Blue Bottle's cost structure. With "controlling investments" in both Luckin and Blue Bottle, Dazheng Capital has achieved complete coverage in the coffee sector, from mass consumption to high-end specialty. 报道还表示，收购蓝瓶将有助于瑞幸推进高端化战略，瑞幸也会利用供应链能力优化蓝瓶的成本结构。用 「控股式投资」 拥有了瑞幸和蓝瓶的大钲资本，在咖啡赛道实现了从大众消费到高端精品的完整覆盖。

Additionally, according to 36Kr, Blue Bottle Coffee is currently operating at a loss. As of June 30, 2025, Blue Bottle Coffee's revenue for the past 12 months was approximately $250 million, with the US contributing about $150 million and the Asia-Pacific region contributing about $100 million; it is expected to achieve profitability in 2026. 另据 36 氪报道，蓝瓶咖啡目前仍在亏损中。截至 2025 年 6 月 30 日，蓝瓶咖啡过去 12 个月的营收约为 2.5 亿美元，其中美国贡献收入约 1.5 亿美元，亚太地区贡献收入约 1 亿美元；预计 2026 年实现盈利。

item.title: 《模拟人生 4》要上线官方交易市场
item.guid: 《模拟人生-4》要上线官方交易市场
item.description:
Recently, "The Sims 4" team officially announced the launch of a new official trading platform, "The Sims 4 Marketplace," which will allow creators to earn revenue sharing by selling custom game content. 近期，《模拟人生 4》团队正式宣布，将推出全新的官方交易平台「模拟人生市场」（The Sims 4 Marketplace），允许创作者通过出售自定义游戏内容获取收入分成。

It is reported that creators will receive a 30% share of actual sales (e.g., for every 100 Moola spent by players, creators will receive $0.30). EA stated that the remaining 70% of the revenue will be used to cover platform fees, server operations, and official localization translation costs for 18 languages. 据悉，创作者将获得实际销售额 30% 的分成（例如玩家每消费 100 Moola，创作者结算 0.30 美元）。EA 方面声明，剩余 70% 的收入将用于覆盖平台抽成、服务器运维及 18 种语言的官方本地化翻译成本。

The trading platform will first launch on PC and Mac platforms on March 17, 2026, and will subsequently expand to PlayStation and Xbox consoles. 该交易平台将于 2026 年 3 月 17 日率先登陆 PC 与 Mac 平台，后续扩展至 PlayStation 及 Xbox 主机端。

item.title: 微软 Xbox 未来或支持 AI 代打
item.guid: 微软-Xbox-未来或支持-AI-代打
item.description:
According to Neowin, Microsoft has recently been reported to have applied for a new Xbox gaming patent, aiming to take over control via a cloud-based AI model and automatically complete difficult game levels for players. 据 Neowin 报道，微软近期被曝申请了一项全新的 Xbox 游戏专利，旨在通过云端 AI 模型接管控制权并替玩家自动完成高难度游戏关卡。

The patent is titled "State Management for Video Game Help Sessions." Patent documents show that Microsoft is designing a cloud-based assistance system that allows players, when stuck in a game, to request an "assistant" from the system to temporarily gain full control of the current Xbox session. 该专利名为「视频游戏帮助会话的状态管理」。专利文件显示，微软正在设计一种基于云端的辅助系统，允许玩家在遭遇游戏卡关时，向系统请求「助手」临时获取当前 Xbox 会话的完全控制权。

This mechanism differs from player summons or online assistance in traditional multiplayer games; instead, the system directly takes over underlying physical or logical operations and independently completes the level. 该机制不同于传统多人游戏中的玩家召唤或联机协助，而是直接由系统接管底层物理或逻辑操作并独立打通关卡。

The document notes that while the "assistant" could be another human player, Microsoft explicitly identifies AI models as the key technical solution for performing such core "play-on-behalf" tasks in the patent. 文件注明，虽然该「助手」身份可以是其他真人玩家，但微软在专利中明确将 AI 模型作为执行此类核心代打任务的关键技术实现方案。

item.title: 甜茶将来中国路演，《至尊马蒂》发布新预告
item.guid: 甜茶将来中国路演，《至尊马蒂》发布新预告
item.description:
According to Sina Movies, the film "Marty Supreme" has released a new trailer, and its star Timothée Chalamet (Sweet Tea) will also embark on his first China tour to promote the film. 据新浪电影消息，电影《至尊马蒂》发布新预告，并且主演甜茶（提莫西·查拉梅）也将为影片宣传开启首次中国之旅。

It is reported that the film tells an original fictional story about a table tennis player, based on the American Marty Reisman. Directed by Josh Safdie, the elder of the Safdie brothers, it stars Gwyneth Paltrow, Odessa A'zion, and Tyler, The Creator, produced by A24, and will be released on March 20. 据悉，该片讲述一个关于乒乓球运动员的原创虚构故事，原型为美国人 Marty Reisman。由萨弗迪兄弟的哥哥乔什· 萨弗迪执导，格温妮斯·帕特洛、敖德萨·阿德隆、Tyler, The Creator 出演，A24 出品，将于 3 月 20 日上映。

item.title: 恐怖喜剧片《禁果》发布海报
item.guid: 恐怖喜剧片《禁果》发布海报
item.description:
According to Hollywood Reporter, the horror-comedy film "Forbidden Fruit" has released its poster and will be released in North America on March 27. 据守望好莱坞消息，恐怖喜剧片《禁果》发布海报，将于 3 月 27 日北美上映。

The film tells the story of store clerks Apple, Cherry, and Fig forming a (crossed out) fruit (crossed out) witch coven, and how their new colleague Pumpkin questions their sisterhood, forcing the three to confront their inner darkness, leading to a violent tale. 影片讲述同一家商店里的店员 Apple、Cherry 和 Fig 组成了一个（划掉）水果（划掉）女巫团体，而新来的同事 Pumpkin 对她们的姐妹情发出质疑，迫使三人不得不面对内心的黑暗，引发了暴力的故事。

The film is directed by Meredith Alloway, produced by Diablo Cody, and stars Lili Reinhart, Lola Tung, Victoria Pedretti, and Alexandra Shipp. 该片由 Meredith Alloway 执导，迪亚波罗·科蒂担任制片人，莉莉·莱因哈特、罗拉·董、维多利亚·佩德雷蒂、亚历山德拉·西普主。

item.title: 消息称华纳确认开发《权力的游戏》电影
item.guid: 消息称华纳确认开发《权力的游戏》电影
item.description:
According to a recent report by Page Six Hollywood, Warner Bros. has officially commenced development on the first theatrical film for 'Game of Thrones,' with renowned screenwriter Beau Willimon having submitted a prequel script to the studio. 据 Page Six Hollywood 日前报道，华纳兄弟正式启动《权力的游戏》首部院线电影开发工作，知名编剧博·威廉蒙已向官方提交前传剧本。

The report states that the film project is based on George R.R. Martin's fantasy novel universe, with its core plot focusing on Aegon I, the founder of the Targaryen dynasty, primarily recounting his conquest of the continent of Westeros. 报道称，该电影项目基于乔治·R·R·马丁的奇幻小说宇宙改编，核心情节聚焦于坦格利安王朝的建立者伊耿一世，主要讲述其征服维斯特洛大陆的战争进程。

The project is currently still in its early production stages, with no specific production timeline, director, or cast announced yet. 项目目前仍处于早期制作阶段，尚未公布具体的制作时间表、导演及演员阵容。

Insiders revealed that Warner Bros. executives have positively reviewed Willimon's submitted draft script, believing his screenwriting experience in political maneuvering highly aligns with the film's narrative requirements. 知情人士透露，华纳兄弟高层对威廉蒙提交的初稿剧本评价积极，认为其在政治博弈层面的编剧经验高度契合该电影的叙事需求。

早报
